name: BigCommerce
description: BigCommerce is an enterprise e-commerce platform providing REST APIs to manage online stores. Agents can programmatically manage products, orders, customers, carts, and categories across BigCommerce storefronts.

capabilities.name: list_products
capabilities.description: Retrieve a paginated list of products from the BigCommerce store. Supports filtering by name, SKU, price range, availability, category, and brand.

capabilities.name: create_product
capabilities.description: Create a new product in the BigCommerce catalog with name, type, price, weight, SKU, description, images, and category assignments.

capabilities.name: list_orders
capabilities.description: Retrieve a paginated list of orders from the BigCommerce store. Supports filtering by status, customer ID, date ranges, and minimum/maximum totals.

capabilities.name: get_order
capabilities.description: Retrieve the full details of a specific order including line items, shipping addresses, billing address, and payment information.

capabilities.name: list_customers
capabilities.description: Retrieve a paginated list of customers from the BigCommerce store. Supports filtering by name, email, company, customer group, and date ranges.

capabilities.name: create_cart
capabilities.description: Create a new shopping cart with line items, customer ID, and channel ID. Returns the cart object with calculated totals and checkout URL.

capabilities.name: list_categories
capabilities.description: Retrieve the category tree for the BigCommerce store. Returns all categories with their hierarchy, names, descriptions, and product counts.
